content:
DEAL NOTE
Customer: NorthBridge Consulting
Customer ID: C010
Contract ID: K020
Account Executive: Sarah Chen
Deal Type: Renewal + Upgrade
Date: March 1, 2024

DEAL SUMMARY
Renewed NorthBridge Consulting and upgraded from DataSync Pro Starter to Enterprise, expanding from 10 to 50 users. No discount. New ARR: $45,000.

RENEWAL NOTES
Expansion reflects a company-wide rollout decision made by Patricia Wells in Q4 2023. NorthBridge added 12 new consultants in 2023 and decided to standardize DataSync Pro across the entire consulting team rather than maintain a tiered access model.

NEGOTIATION NOTES
No discount requested. Patricia Wells stated the platform had exceeded expectations and she wanted to move quickly. The renewal conversation took two calls and nine days from initiation to signature — the fastest renewal in Sarah Chen's portfolio this cycle.

EXPANSION POTENTIAL
Full penetration of the consulting team achieved. Future growth will be headcount-driven. Patricia also mentioned exploring DataSync Pro for a new government practice they are launching in Q2 2024, which may have specific compliance requirements worth exploring.
